creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks Mikhail for your report.

The issue you are reporting is correct and indeed has also been discussed in PR #265254, which as you can see is still open. You might also want to look at the upstream bug report, where you can read that a fix is ready for GCC 13: https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=106328 . GCC 13 development snapshots are available on FreeBSD through the lang/gcc13-devel port and a lang/gcc13 port will be prepared as soon as the first release of GCC 13 is ready.

Thus I think we can close this bug again, this time as a duplicate of PR #265254. If you have any more information about the issue, I encourage you to add it to PR #265254 or to the upstream bug.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 265254 ***
